scripts.serve:test:static: npm run build && npx @11ty/eleventy && node test/static-server.js
scripts.lint:standard: XDG_CACHE_HOME=.cache standard --env browser --env node --env jest --global d3 --global ob --global $ --global jQuery --global event --global width --global OpenSpending --global define --global _ --global $jit --global yepnope --global json --global _grandparent "js/**/*.js" "js/**/*.jsx" "test/**/*.js" "__tests__/**/*.js" "bench/**/*.js"
scripts.lint:eslint: eslint --max-warnings=0 js/compare __tests__ test bench jest.config.cjs webpack.config.js --ext .js,.jsx,.cjs
scripts.lint: npm run lint:standard && npm run lint:eslint
scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run test:unit && npm run test:a11y && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e: npm run test:e2e:preflight && start-server-and-test serve:test:static http://127.0.0.1:8011 test:e2e:run
scripts.test:e2e:nobuild: npm run test:e2e:preflight && start-server-and-test serve:test:static:nobuild http://127.0.0.1:8011 test:e2e:run:ci
scripts.test:e2e:parallel: npm run test:e2e:preflight && start-server-and-test "PORT=18011 npm run serve:test:static" http://127.0.0.1:18011 "BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:18011 npm run test:e2e:run"
scripts.test:docker: npm run lint && npm run test:unit:coverage -- --maxWorkers=50% && npm run test:a11y -- --maxWorkers=50% && npm run test:e2e:nobuild
scripts.verify:all:parallel: bash -lc 'set -uo pipefail; fail=0; npm run lint:standard & p1=$!; npm run lint:eslint & p2=$!; npm run test:unit & p3=$!; npm run test:a11y & p4=$!; npm run test:e2e:parallel & p5=$!; wait "$p1" || fail=1; wait "$p2" || fail=1; wait "$p3" || fail=1; wait "$p4" || fail=1; wait "$p5" || fail=1; exit "$fail"'
